name: Oatmeal Apple Cranberry Scones
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F. Spray a baking sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, oats, sugar, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon. Add 3/4 cup applesauce and margarine; mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in the cranberries and apple. In a small bowl, combine the milk and 1/4 cup honey. Add to the flour mixture; stir together until the dough forms a ball. Turn the dough out onto a well-floured surface; knead 10 to 12 times. Pat the dough into an 8-inch circle. Place on the baking sheet. Use the tip of a knife to score the dough into 12 wedges. Brush the top with remaining honey mixture. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from the baking sheet; cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Serve warm or cool completely. Cut into 12 wedges.
